name: Hot Baba Ghanoush with Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp to 1/4 t Cayenne, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cut the eggplant in half and place cut side down on a lightly oiled baking sheet. Pierce with a fork several times.
3. Bake for 40 minutes, or until very soft and collapsing.
4. Scoop out the insides and puree everything except the parsley and pasta in a food processor or blender.
5. Let sit awhile so flavors can blend.
6. Bring several quarts of water to a boil and cook pasta al dente.
7. Gently heat the sauce while the pasta is cooking.
8. Drain the pasta and mix with the sauce.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley (you can also add Parmesan, which sounds weird but is good). It's also delicious without it.
